mapper.select: SELECT * FROM VW_ACTIVE_MANAGER WHERE OWNER_USER_ID = #{ownerUserId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MANAGER_HISTORY (MANAGER_HISTORY_ID, CAFE_ID, USER_ID, REG_EVENT_ID) VALUES (MANAGER_HISTORY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{cafeId}, #{userId}, 1)
INSERT INTO MANAGER_HISTORY (MANAGER_HISTORY_ID, CAFE_ID, USER_ID, REG_EVENT_ID) VALUES (MANAGER_HISTORY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{cafeId}, #{userId}, 2)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM V_ACTIVE_MANAGER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
